Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

I like this patch and want to see it landed, but I don't understand why we are now setting writethrough to 'on' in test 224c. Please let me know why and I'm happy to change my review to +1.

Also, on the master branch without this patch, ONLY=224c passes. I also tried various combinations of running test 155x and 224c together and I can't get test 224c to fail.

Patch Set 3:

James, thanks for review.
>I like this patch and want to see it landed, but I don't understand why we are now setting writethrough to 'on' in test 224c. Please let me know why and I'm happy to change my review to +1.
Because setting write through has influence on  memory pages freeing. So, if the fix patch from http://es-gerrit.xyus.xyratex.com:8080/#/c/5473/ is not applied, and then writethrough to 'off,', when running "155x and 224c together" always passes, but is must fails.
>Also, on the master branch without this patch, ONLY=224c passes. I also tried various combinations of running test 155x and 224c together and I can't get test 224c to fail.

You need revert patch from http://es-gerrit.xyus.xyratex.com:8080/#/c/5473/ and 224c will fail if "test 155x and 224c together".

Best regards.

Patch Set 3:

James, does my last answer make sense?

Patch Set 3:

Artem - Yes, this makes sense. Since I can't access http://es-gerrit.xyus.xyratex.com:8080/#/c/5473/ is there a corresponding LU/JIRA ticket or a patch in gerrit that I can look at. I just want to run this test and get it to fail without the 5473 patch but don't know how far back in Lustre releases to go back to.

Patch Set 3:

(1 comment)

James, yes sure there is such LU with patch that can be reverted for testing.
https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-6441

parents.subject: LU-6245 libcfs: move uid handling to linux directory

commit.subject: LU-7149 tests: restore writethrough_cache_enable
commit.message:
LU-7149 tests: restore writethrough_cache_enable

Test sanity.sh test_224c is failed as expected if executed separately
and passes if executed by automatic system. Tests 155d,155f,155h,156
do "set_cache writethrough off" and don't restore the state. This
makes next tests work incorrectly.

This patch adds writethrough_cache_enable restore for each function
above.

Test-Parameters: trivial

Signed-off-by: Artem Blagodarenko <artem.blagodarenko@seagate.com>
Xyratex-bug-id: MRP-2590
Change-Id: I5f4f3f6c419a3aa415426607e776403da9822c2c
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/16424
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
